---
title: "SAGs technical results - ANI"
author: "Aleix Obiol"
date: "2026-03-23"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
source("../aux_functions_sags.R")
```

## Helper functions

```{r}
scale_ani_identity <- function() {
  scale_x_discrete(
    breaks = function(x) {
      vals <- as.numeric(sub(".*,", "", gsub("\\(|\\]", "", x)))
      x[vals %in% c(70, 80, 90, 100)]
    },
    labels = function(x) sub(".*,", "", gsub("\\(|\\]", "%", x)),
    drop = FALSE
  )
}

plot_ani_hist <- function(data, facet_var, ncol = NULL, nrow = NULL, annotate_col = NULL) {
  
  plot <- 
    ggplot(data, aes(x = bin_pident, y = bin_length / 1e6)) +
    geom_col(color = 'white', linewidth = .2) +
    theme_sags() +
    theme(strip.text = element_markdown(size = 8)) +
    labs(y = 'Size (Mbp)', x = 'Percentage of identity') +
    scale_ani_identity()
    
  if (!missing(annotate_col)) {
    annotations <- 
      data |> 
      group_by({{facet_var}}, label = {{annotate_col}}) |> 
      summarise(
        y = max(bin_length) / (1.2 * 1e6)
      ) |> 
      mutate(x = if_else(
        str_detect({{facet_var}},'ICM0067.*ICM0068|ICM0053.*ICM0092|ICM0102.*ICM0110'), 
        factor('(88,89]'), # label to right
        factor('(70,71]') # label to left
        )
        )
    
    plot <- 
      plot + 
      geom_richtext(
        data = annotations,
        aes(label = label, x = x, y = y),
        fill = NA,
        label.color = NA,
        size = 2.5,
        hjust = 0
      )
  }
  
  plot <- 
    plot +
    facet_wrap(vars({{facet_var}}), scales = 'free_y', ncol = ncol, nrow = nrow) +
    force_panelsizes(rows = unit(4, 'cm'), cols = unit(6, 'cm'), respect = T)
  
  return(plot)
}

ncol = 8
```


## Read data

```{r}
ani_df <- 
  read_tsv('../../data/ani/ani_data.tsv.gz')

comparisons_data <- 
  read_tsv('../../data/ani/ani_comparisons.tsv')

ani_comparison_df <- 
  read_tsv('../../data/ani/ani_data_diff_species.tsv.gz') |> 
  mutate(
    name = paste0(comparison, ' (',group,')'),
    additional_data = paste0('*Comp:* ',`%-compared genomes`,'%<br>*18S:* ',`%-18S`,'%'),
         name = str_replace(name, '-%','-'),
         comparison = factor(comparison, levels = comparisons_data$comparison)) |> 
  arrange(comparison) |> 
  mutate(name = str_replace(name, 'ICM', '**ICM'),
         name = str_replace(name, ' vs ','** vs **'),
         name = str_replace(name, ' \\(','** ('),
         name = fct_inorder(name))

figure_legends <- 
  readxl::read_excel('../../data/aux/figure_legends.xlsx')
```

## ANI within COSAGs

```{r}
comparisons_per_sag <- # all comparisons, not just unique pairs (i.e., A vs B but also B vs A)
  ani_df |> 
  distinct(sag_id, query_id, subject_id) |> 
  count(sag_id, name = 'n_comparisons')

ani_df_len <- 
  ani_df |> 
  mutate(bin_pident = cut_width(pident, width = 1, boundary = 100)) |> 
  summarise(bin_length_raw = sum(len), .by = c(sag_id, bin_pident)) |> 
  left_join(comparisons_per_sag) |> 
  mutate(bin_length = bin_length_raw / n_comparisons)

p_ani_hist_len <- 
  plot_ani_hist(ani_df_len, facet_var = sag_id, ncol = ncol)
```

## ANI between different SAGs

```{r}
ani_comparison_length_df <- 
  ani_comparison_df |> 
  mutate(bin_pident = cut_width(pident, width = 1, boundary = 100)) |> 
  group_by(comparison, bin_pident, type, name, additional_data) |> 
  summarise(bin_length = sum(len))

p_ani_comparison_len <- 
  plot_ani_hist(ani_comparison_length_df, facet_var = name, ncol = ncol, annotate_col = additional_data)
```

## Fig supp

```{r}
fig <- 'S1'
caption <- figure_legends |> filter(figure == fig) |> pull()

figS1 <- 
  wrap_plots(
    p_ani_hist_len,
    p_ani_comparison_len +
      labs(caption = caption) +
      theme(
        plot.caption = element_textbox_simple(
          margin = margin(30,0,5,0),
          size = 12
          )
        ),
    ncol = 1
  ) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = list(paste0('**',LETTERS[1:2],'**'))) &
  theme(
    plot.tag = element_markdown()
  )

ggsave(plot = figS1,
       filename = '../../figures/figS1.pdf',
       height = 17,
       width = 23)

```
